purpose: Country-by-country source registry for public-record influence, corporate, spending, FOIA, and advisory-appointment collection.

evidence_policy.trust_1: Official government, parliament, regulator, court, or intergovernmental source.
evidence_policy.trust_2: Structured secondary dataset with references to official or reputable sources.
evidence_policy.trust_3: Media or derived source; use when official data is missing and retain source notes.
evidence_policy.trust_4: Unreviewed sensitive claims; never expose publicly until reviewed.

opencorporates.label: OpenCorporates company registry index
opencorporates.notes: Global company identity and officer source. Prefer official national registries where a country-specific direct source is added later.

opensanctions.label: OpenSanctions PEP and sanctions datasets
opensanctions.notes: Structured cross-border PEP, sanctions, and state-linked actor data with source references.

wikidata.label: Wikidata SPARQL endpoint
wikidata.notes: Identity aliases and reviewed public affiliations only; sensitive affiliations remain hidden until reviewed.

us_fec.label: Federal Election Commission OpenFEC API
us_fec.notes: Candidate campaign-finance totals. Itemized individual donor records are public but are intentionally excluded from the live collector.

us_fec_committee.label: Federal Election Commission committee registry
us_fec_committee.notes: Official FEC committee identity and registration metadata.

us_fec_contribution.label: Federal Election Commission non-individual itemized receipts
us_fec_contribution.notes: Only organization, committee, PAC, and party receipts are collected; individual and candidate-name receipt rows are skipped to keep the platform conservative.

us_fec_bulk_contribution.label: Federal Election Commission bulk non-individual receipts
us_fec_bulk_contribution.notes: Official FEC bulk receipts fallback for committee, organisation, PAC, and party entity types. Individual rows are excluded.

us_lda.label: US Senate Lobbying Disclosure Act filings API

us_fara.label: US DOJ FARA eFile API
us_fara.notes: Official US foreign-agent registration and activity records.

sec_edgar.label: SEC EDGAR submissions API
sec_edgar.notes: Official public-company filing history and issuer metadata.

sec_edgar_companyfacts.label: SEC EDGAR XBRL company facts API
sec_edgar_companyfacts.notes: Official issuer financial facts such as revenue, net income, assets, cash, and debt.

usaspending.label: USAspending API
usaspending.notes: Official federal award and contract data under the DATA Act.

us_foia.label: FOIA.gov agency component API
us_foia.notes: Official agency-component registry and annual-report XML endpoints. Request-level FOIA data requires agency-specific handling.

us_foia_annual_report.label: FOIA annual report XML sources
us_foia_annual_report.notes: Official agency-level annual FOIA workload, backlog, staffing, and cost summaries. The collector uses direct agency XML files first and FOIA.gov API as fallback when rate limits permit.

us_pcast.label: White House President's Council of Advisors on Science and Technology appointments
us_pcast.notes: Official White House advisory appointment announcement.

eu_transparency_register.label: EU Transparency Register
eu_transparency_register.notes: Official EU register of interest representatives.

lobbyfacts.label: LobbyFacts
lobbyfacts.notes: Secondary structured EU transparency data with references back to official records.

eu_expert_groups.label: European Commission Register of Expert Groups
eu_expert_groups.notes: Official register with group missions, tasks, membership, minutes, agendas, and reports.

eu_chief_scientific_advisors.label: European Commission Group of Chief Scientific Advisors
eu_chief_scientific_advisors.notes: Official European Commission science-advice body and member renewal record.

eu_ege.label: European Group on Ethics in Science and New Technologies
eu_ege.notes: Official European Commission ethics advisory body and member pages.

coverage_notes: No comparable domestic lobbying/advisory registry has been wired for this country yet; use global PEP/sanctions/company sources plus US/EU foreign-principal disclosures when the country appears there.
